zh.Silesia, , Bohemia, Holy Roman Empire: 海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇傑史萊先
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henryk II Pobożny Piast於1191年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇傑史萊先時，他的父親Henryk Brodaty Piast25歲，母親Hedwig von Andechs17歲。他於大約1216年與Anna Přemyslovna結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1241年4月9日在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉萊格尼尼次吉 波爾享年50歲，埋葬在波蘭多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henryk II Pobożny Piast于1191年出生在海利格斯 洛米設斯 萊奇傑史萊先时，他的父亲Henryk Brodaty Piast25岁，母亲Hedwig von Andechs17岁。他于大约1216年与Anna Přemyslovna结婚。他们至少是5个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1241年4月9日在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊格尼尼次吉萊格尼尼次吉 波爾享年50岁，埋葬在波兰多爾諾希利a斯吉萊瓦福。

nameMeanings.name: Piast
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Altered form of French and Walloon Piat: from the personal name Piat, from the Latin name Piatus ‘expiated’ (from the past participle of the verb pio ‘to appease; to expiate’). The name was borne by Saint Piatus of Tournai (in Wallonia, Belgium), who was martyred under the Roman Emperor Maximian c. 286 AD . Altered ending of the surname reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Pyatt .
English (Lancashire and Cheshire): variant of   Pyatt  .

History: This surname (see 1 above) is listed along with the variant Pyatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors and also in the similar register of the Huguenot Society of America.

variants.name: Pyatt
meanings: English (mainly Staffordshire): nickname either from Middle English piot ‘magpie’ (Old French pïot, a diminutive of Old French pie), commonly used to denote a chattering woman, or alternatively from an unrecorded Middle English pyard, an uncomplimentary term derived from the same Old French word + -(h)ard. Compare Pye .
Variant of   Piatt  , a surname of French and Walloon origin.
History: This surname (see 2 above) is listed along with the variant Piatt in the (US) National Huguenot Society's register of qualified Huguenot ancestors.

nameMeanings.name: Henryk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Henryk II Pobożny Piast was born in 1191, in Silesia, Bohemia, Holy Roman Empire, his father, Henryk Brodaty Piast, was 25 and his mother, Hedwig von Andechs, was 17. He married Anna Přemyslovna about 1216. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 6 daughters. He died on 9 April 1241, in Legnickie Pole, Legnica, Lower Silesia, Poland, at the age of 50, and was buried in Wrocław, Lower Silesia, Poland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henryk II Pobożny Piast est né en 1191, à Schlesien, Bohême, Saint-Empire romain, son père, Henryk Brodaty Piast, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Hedwig von Andechs, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Anna Přemyslovna environ 1216. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé le 9 avril 1241, à Legnickie Pole, Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Pologne, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Pologne.

de.Krosno Odrzańskie, Krośnieński, Lubuskie: Krosno Odrzańskie, Powiat krośnieński, lubuskie, Polen
de.lifeSummary: Als Henryk II Pobożny Piast 1191 in Schlesien, Böhmen, Heiliges Römisches Reich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henryk Brodaty Piast 25 und seine Mutter Hedwig von Andechs 17. Er hat um 1216 Anna Přemyslovna geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb am 9. April 1241 im Alter von 50 Jahren in Legnickie Pole, Legnicki, Niederschlesien, Polen und wurde in Wrocław, Niederschlesien, Polen begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henryk II Pobożny Piast è nato il nel 1191 nel Schlesien, Čechy, Heiliges Römisches Reich, il suo padre, Henryk Brodaty Piast, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Hedwig von Andechs, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Anna Přemyslovna circa 1216. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 6 figlie. Morì il 9 aprile 1241, nel Legnickie Pole, Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polonia, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polonia.

ko.lifeSummary: Henryk II Pobożny Piast(이)가 1191년 헤이리그스 o미슈스 라이치 cc히 슐레시에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henryk Brodaty Piast(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Hedwig von Andechs(은)는 17세였다. 그는 대략 1216년 Anna Přemyslovna(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1241년 4월 9일 폴란드 도노sa스키 레그닉키 레그닉키 포일에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 폴란드 도노sa스키 록l아w에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henryk II Pobożny Piast nasceu em 1191, em Schlesien, Čechy, Heiliges Römisches Reich, seu pai, Henryk Brodaty Piast, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Hedwig von Andechs, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Anna Přemyslovna aproximadamente 1216. Eles tiveram pelo menos 5 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de abril de 1241, em Legnickie Pole, Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polônia, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polônia.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henryk II Pobożny Piast родился в 1191 г. в местности щлесиен, cечи, хилигесь рoмищесь раич, его отцу по имени Henryk Brodaty Piast было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Hedwig von Andechs, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Anna Přemyslovna около 1216 г. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер 9 апреля 1241 г. в местности легникки пол, легникки, долноsлaски, Польша в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности рокlав, долноsлaски, Польша.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henryk II Pobożny Piast nació en 1191, en Schlesien, Čechy, Heiliges Römisches Reich, su papá, Henryk Brodaty Piast, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Hedwig von Andechs, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Anna Přemyslovna aproximadamente 1216. Fueron padres de por lo menos 5 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió el 9 de abril de 1241, en Legnickie Pole, Legnicki, dolnośląskie, Polonia, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Wrocław, dolnośląskie, Polonia.
